privileged_info_summary: The crime_scene_sketch task uses a real architectural floorplan (2-car garage drawing from jscad/sample-files repository, 1.1MB, 967 entities) downloaded from GitHub. Task metadata correctly specifies all geometry coordinates: E1 circle at [4500, 2500] with radius 50, E2 line from [5000, 3000] to [5600, 3200], triangulation points at [0, 0] and [6000, 0]. EVIDENCE layer color is correctly mapped to DXF color 1 (Red). However, there is a color code error: MEASUREMENTS layer is assigned color 4 in metadata, but color 4 in DXF is Cyan; the task description specifies 'Color: Blue' which corresponds to DXF color 5. All coordinates and dimensions are internally consistent and used uniformly throughout the task definition and verifier logic.
